mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status != 'DELETED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM application_case ac INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id WHERE ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interview_session session INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = session.application_case_id INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id WHERE session.deleted_at IS NULL AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(credit_used), 0) FROM ai_usage_log WHERE created_at >= DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE, '%Y-%m-01')
SELECT plan AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM users WHERE status != 'DELETED' AND deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY plan ORDER BY count DESC, plan

SELECT ac.status AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM application_case ac INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id WHERE ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY ac.status ORDER BY count DESC, ac.status

SELECT ac.id AS application_case_id, fa.id AS fit_analysis_id, users.name AS user_name, users.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, fa.missing_skills, fa.fit_score, fa.created_at AS analyzed_at, fa.matched_skills, fa.certificate_recommendations, fa.strategy, fa.status, fa.condition_matrix, fa.analysis_confidence, fa.apply_decision FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id WHERE ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL AND fa.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest_fa.id) FROM fit_analysis latest_fa WHERE latest_fa.application_case_id = fa.application_case_id ) ORDER BY fa.created_at DESC, fa.id DESC

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS usage_date, COALESCE(SUM(token_usage), 0) AS token_usage, COALESCE(SUM(credit_used), 0) AS credit_used FROM ai_usage_log WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY usage_date

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'FIT_ANALYSIS' AS source, fa.id AS ref_id, users.name AS user_name, users.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, fa.status, fa.error_message, fa.model, 0 AS retryable, fa.created_at FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id INNER JOIN users ON users.id = ac.user_id WHERE fa.status != 'SUCCESS' AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT run.analysis_type AS source, run.id AS ref_id, users.name AS user_name, users.email AS user_email, NULL AS company_name, NULL AS job_title, run.status, run.error_message, run.model, run.retryable, run.created_at FROM career_analysis_run run INNER JOIN users ON users.id = run.user_id WHERE run.status != 'SUCCESS' AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL ) failures ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO analysis_quality_flag (target_type, target_id, flag_type, severity, memo, resolved) VALUES (#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{flagType}, #{severity}, #{memo}, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE severity = VALUES(severity), memo = VALUES(memo)
mapper.update: UPDATE analysis_quality_flag SET resolved = 1 WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND flag_type = #{flagType} AND ( #{targetType} != 'FIT_ANALYSIS' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM fit_analysis active_fit INNER JOIN application_case active_case ON active_case.id = active_fit.application_case_id INNER JOIN users active_user ON active_user.id = active_case.user_id WHERE active_fit.id = #{targetId} AND active_case.deleted_at IS NULL AND active_user.status != 'DELETED' AND active_user.deleted_at IS NULL ) )
mapper.select:
SELECT run.*, users.name AS user_name, users.email AS user_email, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_career_run_memo memo_count_source WHERE memo_count_source.career_analysis_run_id = run.id AND memo_count_source.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS memo_count, ( SELECT MAX(latest_memo.updated_at) FROM admin_career_run_memo latest_memo WHERE latest_memo.career_analysis_run_id = run.id AND latest_memo.deleted_at IS NULL ) AS latest_memo_at FROM career_analysis_run run INNER JOIN users ON users.id = run.user_id
users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL
AND run.user_id = #{userId}
ORDER BY run.created_at DESC, run.id DESC LIMIT 300

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT 'FIT_ANALYSIS' AS event_type, fa.id AS ref_id, CONCAT(ac.company_name, ' ', ac.job_title, ' 적합도 분석') AS summary, fa.status, fa.fit_score AS score, fa.created_at FROM fit_analysis fa INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'LEARNING_TASK' AS event_type, task.id AS ref_id, CONCAT(task.skill, ' 학습 과제: ', task.title) AS summary, IF(task.completed, 'COMPLETED', 'ACTIVE') AS status, NULL AS score, task.created_at FROM fit_analysis_learning_task task INNER JOIN fit_analysis fa ON fa.id = task.fit_analysis_id INNER JOIN application_case ac ON ac.id = fa.application_case_id WHERE ac.user_id = #{userId} AND ac.deleted_at IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT run.analysis_type AS event_type, run.id AS ref_id, IF(run.analysis_type = 'DASHBOARD_SUMMARY', '대시보드 요약 생성', '장기 취업 경향 분석') AS summary, run.status, NULL AS score, run.created_at FROM career_analysis_run run WHERE run.user_id = #{userId} ) timeline WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users timeline_user WHERE timeline_user.id = #{userId} AND timeline_user.status != 'DELETED' AND timeline_user.deleted_at IS NULL ) ORDER BY created_at DESC, ref_id DESC LIMIT 200

SELECT prompt_key, COALESCE(prompt_version, '버전 미기록') AS prompt_version, COUNT(*) AS total_count, SUM(status = 'SUCCESS') AS success_count, SUM(status = 'FALLBACK') AS fallback_count, SUM(status = 'FAILED') AS failed_count, ROUND(AVG(token_usage)) AS average_token_usage FROM ( SELECT 'FIT_ANALYSIS' AS prompt_key, fa.prompt_version, fa.status, COALESCE(usage_log.token_usage, 0) AS token_usage FROM fit_analysis fa LEFT JOIN ai_usage_log usage_log ON usage_log.application_case_id = fa.application_case_id AND usage_log.feature_type = 'FIT_ANALYSIS' AND usage_log.id = (SELECT MAX(latest_usage.id) FROM ai_usage_log latest_usage WHERE latest_usage.application_case_id = fa.application_case_id AND latest_usage.feature_type = 'FIT_ANALYSIS') UNION ALL SELECT run.analysis_type AS prompt_key, run.prompt_version, run.status, run.token_usage FROM career_analysis_run run ) prompt_runs GROUP BY prompt_key, prompt_version ORDER BY prompt_key, prompt_version DESC

SELECT run.*, users.name AS user_name, users.email AS user_email FROM career_analysis_run run INNER JOIN users ON users.id = run.user_id WHERE run.id = #{runId} AND users.status != 'DELETED' AND users.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT memo.id, memo.career_analysis_run_id, memo.admin_user_id, admin_user.name AS admin_name, admin_user.email AS admin_email, memo.memo_type, memo.content, memo.created_at, memo.updated_at FROM admin_career_run_memo memo INNER JOIN users admin_user ON admin_user.id = memo.admin_user_id INNER JOIN career_analysis_run run ON run.id = memo.career_analysis_run_id INNER JOIN users target_user ON target_user.id = run.user_id WHERE memo.career_analysis_run_id = #{runId} AND memo.deleted_at IS NULL AND target_user.status != 'DELETED' AND target_user.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY memo.updated_at DESC, memo.id DESC

SELECT memo.id, memo.career_analysis_run_id, memo.admin_user_id, admin_user.name AS admin_name, admin_user.email AS admin_email, memo.memo_type, memo.content, memo.created_at, memo.updated_at FROM admin_career_run_memo memo INNER JOIN users admin_user ON admin_user.id = memo.admin_user_id INNER JOIN career_analysis_run run ON run.id = memo.career_analysis_run_id INNER JOIN users target_user ON target_user.id = run.user_id WHERE memo.id = #{id} AND memo.career_analysis_run_id = #{runId} AND memo.deleted_at IS NULL AND target_user.status != 'DELETED' AND target_user.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_career_run_memo (career_analysis_run_id, admin_user_id, memo_type, content) VALUES (#{careerAnalysisRunId}, #{adminUserId}, #{memoType}, #{content})
